item.title: You smell that?
item.description: Ever fall in love with a show or comic, only to find out it got canceled due to lack of support? We don’t want that to happen here. Creating these comics is a labor of love, but love alone doesn’t pay the bills. Without financial support, even cherished things fade away. By joining our Patreon, you’re not just getting awesome perks – you’re keeping this comic alive. If you love what we do, help us make sure it doesn’t disappear. Your support means everything. https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.11 FOR POSTERITY
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Alister Lockhart
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Sunset Girl - Esbe, Cold Busted YouTube: https://youtu.be/InU2KqV_94U?si=hhua1zAX1ArORUCu Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3XTV71tTHSLM4ke52lfBsb?si=2bbc07b679ae4a16
Fernando Correa
Virgil Finlay
Shuo Shi
Alejandro Burdisio
Emre Tuna
Rayner Alencar
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 244

item.title: Not surprised just disappointed. Only went on there to see my nieces and nephews grow up.
item.description: My family is all from Vista, Ca but the second they all packed up and moved to Texas all the shit hit the fan. They're now hateful people and I get it you believe what you want to but don't push that bs on me. I literally just want to see pictures of the family since y'all only post to Facebook. I guess I don't need to see a bunch of racist anymore, win for me. I do feel bad for the kids tho.
item.dc:creator: HeartDisplay

item.title: Hamburg, Feb. 1, 2025, protest against all that brown muck.
item.description: Remember that post about the demo I went on? Well, this was two days later; 80k people. Clip source: https://bsky.app/profile/marcolarousse.bsky.social/post/3lh4yaetuk22k Lyrics: "Wehrt euch, leistet Widerstand gegen den Faschismus hier im Land. Haltet fest zusammen, haltet fest zusammen..." Translation: "Resist, put up resistance against the fascism here in the country. Stand together strongly, stand together strongly, ..." ...but those lyrics are apparently still evolving. A while back it was still "Onto the barricades!" https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T6i58D2gN8Y
item.dc:creator: MyLastAccountWasShadowbanned

item.title: Just a little joy amongst all the crap
item.description: This can die in usersub, really don't care. We called my paternal grandparents Mimi and Papa. Both lived into their early 90s and passed in the last decade. Now my parents get to be Mimi and Papa for my son. My Dad flew in to spend the week with us. I think he's going to make such a good Papa.
item.dc:creator: ewakemanVA

item.title: When I stop to listen, I hear violins.
item.description: America has already hit the iceberg. Its system is gonna have to come crashing down by force of a resistance or “the people” to regain control; and install a government with actual electoral integrity.
item.dc:creator: pixelpatron

item.title: This protest needs to be 4 years long
item.description: Plan ahead FP edit. It’s going to be a very long 4 years so don’t be disheartened, trust me, you might not see it but it DOES make a difference. Their goal will be to hide their fear of a popular uprising and any accommodations they make will unlikely be public. The protests will need to be frequent and long. Be prepared. https://imgur.com/gallery/PbOEhAc. But be peaceful. And God speed.
item.dc:creator: killbillsexwife

item.title: Happy 131st Birthday Norman Rockwell! - "The Young Lady with the Shiner", 1953. Oil on canvas.
item.description:
The Saturday Evening Post - May 23, 1953 issue.
Reference photography for "The Young Lady with the Shiner" Rockwell often used neighborhood children and friends as his models.
The Runaway, 1958. Cover illustration for The Saturday Evening Post, September 20, 1958. Oil on canvas.
Rosie the Riveter, 1943. Cover illustration for The Saturday Evening Post, published on May 29, 1943.
The Problem We All Live With - 1964
Rockwell - 1921 Born: February 3, 1894, New York, NY Died: November 8, 1978 (age 84 years), Stockbridge, MA
item.dc:creator: tolson9

item.title: It feels surreal to me as a U.S. citizen
item.description: Saw it coming. Like a vehicle wreck about to happen. All I had the power to do was stand on the sidewalk and wave my arms at the truck loads of maga recklessly navigating through traffic. Hoping someone understands they are about to cause a catastrophic crash and perhaps my action (and action of many others doing the same) wakes some of them and puts the crazy to a halt. Yet, I also knew it was in vein. These bigots are drunk on perceived power and oligarchs are fueling their emotions. The cult followers cannot realize they will also be recipients of the pain they wish to inflict on others. Maybe they don't care as long as "the others" have it worse. I'm hoping reasonable leaders from other countries can create enough pressure to help save us. It will be a rough few years but maybe some good will come of it. The fair-minded in the US population have to shoulder most of the burden to install a solution. There is lot of work to do on the inside. We can't afford to give in. I'll be travelling out of the U.S. for a couple weeks. I have a sensation of embarrassment and shame. My hope is the people I meet will realize not all U.S. citizens are crazy, arrogant jerks and my new acquaintances have empathy. Also, flying scares me when it didn't used to.
item.dc:creator: GregorMadnill

item.title: We gotta get the fuck outta here
item.description: Just casually begging my Canadian boyfriend of 6 years to finally get us the fuck out of the US. Never been proud to be an American at any point in my life, but now this shit is just downright humiliating and terrifying. And it makes me mad seeing what the US Gov't is doing to the US-Canada relationship. Only weeks after Canada sent firefighers to LA, no less. He's been saying he wants to move us to Canada someday once we get married, but now we are thinking we need to expedite that process and start preparing to leave. We will probably start looking at options this week for securing myself a visa because we can't take this insanity any longer. Fingers crossed.
item.dc:creator: ThereAreChameleonsEverywhereProbably

item.title: Memes vol 485 Boobie
item.description:
Another edition of memes my boyfriend and I have sent each other. Ohhhhhhhh I want tacos so bad
This is what I can only imagine when he and his best friend go camping
THIS IS OUTDATED I can now drive
I want a possum so bad and he’s Mexican
Oh this is really sad now
When he came on our screen with his long hair we both GASPED
I’d feed him beans
DEAR GOD WHY DOES IT HAVE TO BE FAMILY GUY
I’m a chompy lady
:(
Nessie tax
Pickles- rest in peace evil Prince
Big Mama tax
item.dc:creator: danat101
